chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1725 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on MA No.9286/2025. 2. For hearing of bail application 07.08.2025 None present for the applicant. ------------------------------- No one was present for the applicant on the last date of hearing. Today again none is present on his behalf. No intimation is received. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
